posts.text:
I strongly support my colleague @SenJohnKennedy’s legislation, the No Shutdown Paychecks to Politicians Act. If the men and women who stepped up to serve the Department of Homeland Security—to keep Americans safe—aren’t getting paid, then neither should members of Congress.

Video

posts.text: Proud to stand with @SenMikeLee and my Republican colleagues to fight for free and fair elections for the American people. Let’s pass the SAVE America Act.
posts.quote: Proud to stand with @SenMikeLee and my Republican colleagues to fight for free and fair elections for the American people. Let’s pass the SAVE America Act.

posts.text:
We must pass the SAVE America Act. 

Democrats are ok with requiring an ID to shovel snow and enter their campaign rallies, but not to secure our elections. 

My Democratic colleagues should support this legislation and stand with the overwhelming majority of Americans who want this passed.

Video

posts.text:
We owe it to the American people and to the hardworking men and women of DHS who raised their hand to protect our country to sit down, have a conversation, and find a pathway forward. 

I remain committed to fully funding DHS and ending Democrats’ shutdown.

Video
posts.quote:
We owe it to the American people and to the hardworking men and women of DHS who raised their hand to protect our country to sit down, have a conversation, and find a pathway forward. 

I remain committed to fully funding DHS and ending Democrats’ shutdown.

Video

posts.text:
.@POTUS has given Democrats a very reasonable offer to reopen the Department of Homeland Security. It’s time for Democrats to get into a room with Republicans and figure this out.

No more holding hardworking Americans’ paychecks hostage. We can end this today.

Video

posts.text:
I was deeply proud to stand alongside my good friend @SenMullin today to support his nomination to be the next Secretary of Homeland Security. He and Christie are dear friends to Wesley and me, and we are thrilled to see him step into this new role.

Markwayne is a man of deep faith and conviction, is driven by principle, and never backs down from a cause, person, or purpose he believes in. His strong character, love for our nation, and determination are exactly what this country deserves in our

posts.text:
Attending the dignified transfer alongside @POTUS, @SecWar, and several of my colleagues for our six fallen servicemembers today was humbling and heartbreaking. 

Three of the servicemembers were stationed at Sumpter Smith Joint National Guard Base in Birmingham: Alabama native Maj. Alex Klinner, Captain Ariana G. Savino, and Technical Sergeant Ashley B. Pruitt.

Wesley and I will be forever grateful to these heroes for their exemplary service and ultimate sacrifice. We ask that all Alabamians j

Alabama knows how important it is to protect our workers in high-heat environments.

That’s why I’m proud to join @SenBillCassidy in calling to repeal the disastrous Biden-era heat rule and support practical, effective standards that keep workers safe. britt.senate.gov/news/press-…
